children.name: 用户登录测试
parameters: (ApiTestCaseModel(name='用户登录测试', request=RequestModel(method='POST', url='https://httpbin.org/post', headers={}, params={}, json_data={'username': 'test', 'password': 123456}, data={}), validations=[{'eq': {'status_code': 200}}, {'contains': {'body.json.username': 'test'}}, {'in': {'status_code': [200, 201]}}], extractions=[{'token': 'body.json.username'}, {'request_url': 'body.url'}], setup=[], teardown=[]), '/home/runner/work/test_system/test_system/test-engine/data/login.yaml')

children.name: 获取用户信息（使用提取的变量）
